name: Weber Tangy Barbeque Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onions and celery to the skillet. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the onions are translucent and tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the granulated sugar, vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice, dry mustard, and ketchup. Mix well.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 15 to 20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until flavors are well blended and the mixture has thickened slightly.
